blocked_reasons: Qwen3.5-MoE text tower alternates linear_attention and full_attention layers; local wrapper tests now cover both full_attention KV tuples and linear_attention conv/recurrent state round-trip.

BloomBee server KVCacheManager/inference descriptor path still assumes attention KV tensors and does not yet allocate or persist Qwen3.5 linear_attention conv/recurrent state cache, so one-block server proof remains blocked.
Outer qwen3_5_moe multimodal/conditional-generation config remains unserved; this slice registers text_tower model_type=qwen3_5_moe_text only.
next_step: Implement/test BloomBee backend linear-state cache descriptors and update/read/write path before any one-block server proof or route promotion.
